title: Team Tracker Website using GenAI
description: Build a team tracker website utilizing Generative AI technology.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Team Tracker Website using GenAI (DEM-2026-0074)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a Team Tracker website enhanced with Generative AI to improve team management and collaboration. The innovative use of GenAI will streamline data processing and provide dynamic insights for better decision-making.

Business Value  
The solution will increase operational efficiency by automating routine tracking tasks and enhancing real-time visibility into team performance. This will lead to improved resource allocation and faster response times in customer-focused activities.

Risk Mitigation  
To address the medium risk level, the project will incorporate phased development with continuous testing and stakeholder feedback. Data privacy and AI model transparency will be prioritized to ensure compliance and user trust.
